aboutTranslyrics.title: About TransLyrics
aboutTranslyrics.content: TransLyrics is a platform that combines translation and lyrics adaptation, offering a unique approach to singing songs in different languages. We focus on creating singable translations that preserve the song's melody, rhythm, and emotional essence, making it enjoyable to sing in various languages.

ourMission.title: Our Mission
ourMission.content: Our goal is to bridge language barriers in music by providing translations that fit the song’s rhythm and melody. Whether you want to sing in Japanese, English, Indonesian, or other languages, TransLyrics ensures that the emotional impact of the song remains intact.

subSections.subtitle: Singable Translations
subSections.content: We adapt lyrics to maintain the song's flow and melody in different languages.

subSections.subtitle: Multilingual
subSections.content: Experience your favorite songs in multiple languages.

subSections.subtitle: Emotionally True
subSections.content: Our translations aim to keep the original song's emotional essence.
